Title: Android:MDA Connect:Speeches: Embedded YouTube video shows “Error 153: Video player configuration error”
Repro Steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app.
2. Tap the Hamburger menu.
3. Go to MDA Exclusive → Speeches.
4. Open any speech.
Issue: The embedded YouTube video shows “Error 153: Video player configuration error”.

Title: Android:MDA Connect:Volunteer:Downloads: No content shown when opening a download (content visible after file download)
Repro Steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app.
2. Navigate to Volunteer tab.
3. Tap Downloads.
4. Open any download item.
Issue: No content is displayed inside the app when opening a download, but content appears after downloading the file.
